title: Knowledge Subscription Registry
description: Schema for the subscription registry that controls event routing from the knowledge graph to pipeline agents. Each subscription defines which events a subscriber wants to receive, filtered by event type, tags, and entity scope.

subscriberId.description: Unique identifier for the subscriber. Format: {pipeline}/{agent-name} (e.g., 'hold-period/market-pulse-analyst')

displayName.description: Human-readable name of the subscriber for logging and debugging

eventTypes.description: Event types the subscriber wants to receive. Must include at least one.

tags.description: Tag-based filter. If non-empty, only events matching at least one tag are delivered. Empty array = no tag filtering.

entityTypes.description: Only receive events affecting these entity types

entityIds.description: Only receive events affecting these specific entities. Empty = all entities matching entityTypes.

markets.description: Only receive events related to these markets/submarkets

propertyTypes.description: Only receive events related to these property types

entityFilter.description: Entity-based filter. All conditions are AND-ed. Empty object = no entity filtering.

minimum.description: Minimum severity to receive. Events below this severity are filtered out.

deliveryMethod.description: How the subscriber receives events. NOTIFICATION_PACKAGE: bundled delivery at subscriber startup (default). BROADCAST_CHANNEL: written to broadcast directory. DIRECT_INJECTION: injected into agent prompt at launch. POLLING: subscriber reads event stream directly.

maxTokens.description: Maximum token budget for notification packages. Default: 2000.

maxEvents.description: Maximum number of events per delivery. Default: 20.

summarize.description: Whether to summarize events or deliver full event objects. Default: true.

groupBy.description: How to group events in the notification package

enabled.description: Whether this subscription is active. Disabled subscriptions are skipped during routing.

lastDeliveredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last successful delivery. Used to determine which events are new since last delivery.

lastDeliveredEventId.description: Event ID of the last delivered event. Used as cursor for incremental delivery.

notes.description: Documentation of why this subscription exists and what the subscriber does with the data

version.description: Registry version number, incremented on each update
